title: Manifest Committer Implementation
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory in Hadoop MapReduce implements manifest committer functionality. It includes utility methods for IOStatisticsStore and job UUIDs, and task manifests in 'ManifestCommitterSupport.java'. 'ManifestStoreOperations.java' and 'ManifestStoreOperationsThroughFileSystem.java' define file system operations for generating task manifests, using the Abstract Factory pattern. 'AbstractJobOrTaskStage.java' ensures single execution of a stage and handles exceptions, while 'StageConfig.java' uses a builder pattern for creating immutable configurations. This collaboration ensures reliable and efficient commit operations within the MapReduce framework, employing the Builder pattern and robust error handling mechanisms.
